branch_activity_note.note: A prior closure branch was created from an older main head, then the worktree was moved back to main by concurrent activity. The branch was rebased onto main 6e82963a before final validation; this manifest governs the Agent 2 P1 closure remediation state on codex/worldclass-closure-20260414-1512. The exact final branch head is recorded in the merge summary because this manifest is itself part of the validated source tree.

runtime_rebuild_path: RegistryService runtime overlay may consume mom/data/registry when generated locally
